changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/indexing.rs (67.1%, 26 uncovered lines)

Uncovered paths:
- `spawn_indexing_worker()` error callback (lines 60-61)
- `run_indexing_worker()`: file-not-found path (line 101), parse failure path (lines 111-113), chunk write failure with mark-indexed fallback (lines 132-141), mark-indexed failure (line 144), empty chunk skip-and-mark path (lines 121-129)
- `parse_and_extract_chunks()` (lines 211-230): chunk boundary logic, empty file handling

Tests needed:
- Unit test parse_and_extract_chunks with empty file, small file, multi-chunk file
- Integration test with temp DB: insert dirty file, run worker, verify indexed
- Error path: nonexistent file marked dirty

Acceptance: coverage >= 80% for indexing.rs
Test indexing worker error recovery and chunking edge cases
